description: Standard operators as functions. Provides function equivalents for built-in Python operators for use with map(), filter(), reduce(), and similar higher-order functions.

functions.name: add
functions.description: Return a + b for numbers or sequences.

functions.name: sub
functions.description: Return a - b.

functions.name: mul
functions.description: Return a * b for numbers or sequence repetition.

functions.name: div

returns.description: Result of a / b (classic division in Python 2).

functions.description: Return a / b using classic division (integer division for int operands in Python 2).

functions.name: floordiv
functions.description: Return a // b (floor division).

functions.name: mod
functions.description: Return a % b (modulo).

functions.name: pow
functions.description: Return a ** b (exponentiation).

functions.name: neg
functions.description: Return obj negated (-obj).

functions.name: pos
functions.description: Return obj positive (+obj).

functions.name: abs
functions.description: Return the absolute value of obj.

functions.name: inv
functions.description: Return the bitwise inverse of obj (~obj). Alias for invert().

functions.name: invert
functions.description: Return the bitwise inverse of obj (~obj).

functions.name: lshift

params.name: b
params.description: Number of bits to shift left.

functions.description: Return a shifted left by b bits (a << b).

functions.name: rshift

params.name: b
params.description: Number of bits to shift right.

functions.description: Return a shifted right by b bits (a >> b).

functions.name: and_
functions.description: Return the bitwise AND of a and b (a & b).

functions.name: or_
functions.description: Return the bitwise OR of a and b (a | b).

functions.name: xor
functions.description: Return the bitwise exclusive OR of a and b (a ^ b).

functions.name: not_
functions.description: Return the logical negation of obj (not obj).

functions.name: eq
functions.description: Return a == b.

functions.name: ne
functions.description: Return a != b.

functions.name: lt
functions.description: Return a < b.

functions.name: le
functions.description: Return a <= b.

functions.name: gt
functions.description: Return a > b.

functions.name: ge
functions.description: Return a >= b.

functions.name: contains

returns.description: True if b is in a.

functions.description: Return True if b is contained in a (equivalent to b in a).

functions.name: indexOf

returns.description: Index of the first occurrence of b in a.

functions.description: Return the index of the first occurrence of b in a. Raises ValueError if b is not found.

functions.name: countOf

returns.description: Number of occurrences of b in a.

functions.description: Return the number of occurrences of b in a.

functions.name: getitem

params.name: a
params.description: Object to index or key into.

functions.description: Return the value of a at index b (a[b]).

functions.name: setitem
functions.description: Set the value of a at index b to c (a[b] = c).

functions.name: delitem
functions.description: Delete the value of a at index b (del a[b]).

functions.name: attrgetter

params.name: attr
params.description: Attribute name to retrieve. Supports dotted names for nested attributes (e.g., 'foo.bar').

params.name: *attrs
params.description: Additional attribute names. If multiple are given, returns a tuple of values.

returns.description: A callable that fetches the named attribute(s) from its operand.

functions.description: Return a callable object that fetches the given attribute(s) from its operand. After f = attrgetter('name'), f(obj) returns obj.name. Supports dotted names and multiple attributes.

functions.name: itemgetter

params.name: *items
params.description: Additional keys or indices. If multiple are given, returns a tuple of values.

returns.description: A callable that fetches the given item(s) from its operand using __getitem__.

functions.description: Return a callable object that fetches the given item(s) from its operand using __getitem__. After f = itemgetter(2), f(r) returns r[2]. Multiple items return a tuple.

functions.name: methodcaller

params.name: name
params.description: Name of the method to call.

params.name: *args
params.description: Positional arguments to pass to the method.

params.name: **kwargs
params.description: Keyword arguments to pass to the method.

returns.description: A callable that calls the named method on its operand with the given arguments.

functions.description: Return a callable object that calls the named method on its operand. After f = methodcaller('name', 'foo', bar=1), f(obj) returns obj.name('foo', bar=1).

functions.name: iadd
functions.description: Perform a += b in place and return the result.

functions.name: isub
functions.description: Perform a -= b in place and return the result.

functions.name: imul
functions.description: Perform a *= b in place and return the result.

functions.name: idiv
functions.description: Perform a /= b in place and return the result (classic division in Python 2).

functions.name: concat
functions.description: Return a + b for sequences a and b. Both must be sequences (not just iterables).

functions.name: iconcat
functions.description: Perform a += b in place for sequences and return the result.

functions.name: truth

returns.description: True if obj is truthy, False otherwise.

functions.description: Return True if obj is true, False otherwise. Equivalent to bool(obj).
